content:
🌟 memory-guardian | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: Protecting sensitive information from accidental exposure by automatically clearing the device's clipboard.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic Clearing • Manual Clearing • Clipboard Editing • Notifications • Dark Mode
📖 Summary: Memory Guardian is a lightweight Android application designed to enhance user privacy and security by automatically clearing the clipboard at user-defined intervals. It offers manual clearing, clipboard editing, and notifications, all within a minimalistic, ad-free, and permission-free interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
